TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Belize, title = Belize, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Belize} }

S.FORM: Belize hya' ga cyux maki' tay 17 15 N, 88 45 W na cung-Meco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 22,966 sq km (maki' tay 152ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 22,806 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 160 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 353,858. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 6.90%, lhlahuy hya' ga 60.60%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 32.50%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Belmopan. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 10 na tay mqiru' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Elizabeth II, aring ryax tay 6 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1952 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. lalu' koka lalu' na ego ga Belize, lalu' na Sipaya ga Belice. raral ga Belize qani ga lelu nya "Insuhontolas", kawas 1973 lga sinllwan nha ma lalu' na misu la. lalu' sinllwan koka ga ini baqi hinkangi la, pongan sraral ga qutux ke' maha te kahul sa Sipanya qu hngyang na lalu' nha', kawas misu qani lga sinllwan na lalu' qani ga te kahul sa ke Maya, ptring sa "mzyup sa Iza". zywaw na kinbkesan kawas 1502, Klunpu mluw sa syaw na Pelis umi rut thuk Klunpu, ana ga ini tehuk Pelis kakay nya'. kawas 1511, 'ringan balay mtta' sa Pelis ga kahul squliq Oco na Sipanya cinqasu na squliq, ana ga cingay balay ga wayal kyapun na squliq Maya ru psun nha smyus ru alang nha qinyatan. maki' qutux qu kyapun nha ga lalu' nya ga Kunsalo‧Klole ru qekon kin laqi' na kneril Citomar. nasankan, qinnxan nha ga yang Mayas, cyugal laqi' nha' ru nanu qani qu kinholan na Maystiso. kawas 1638, maki' qu squliq na Oco, ana ga aring sa kawas 1670 ungat thozay maki' qutux kawas, kwara squliq qani ga lokah kmut qhuniq, baha hmswa cingay ka qhuniq ga myang qhuniq Moswe, qhuniq mtalax Pasi posun nha sa Oco ru galan nha qqamas. kawas 1700 cinringan, qhuniq na qhuniq hopa na abaw hwasin qani ga soyan nha balay posa sa te binah, nanu yasa cingay balay ku ppquriq ga mwah qmol, maki ku mya Sipanya maki sqani, nanu wahan tmabuqk na squliq na Intuw uzi. trang ryax qasa ga smul ku koka Sipanya swalan nnha squliq na IN mwah kmut qhunliq ini nha swali nha maki sa rhyal qani. kawas 1798, mciriq ku koka IN ru Sipanya, maki qutux thoki' Sipanya lalu' nya ga Zyukatan pwahun nya tyul sazing hopa' na qasu mwah qmul rhyal. byacing qeru ru ryax cyugal tehuk byacing qeru ru ryax mopuw, cingay balay mcilia sa Peris qani, tehuk sa laxan na Sipanya lga, qani sun nha Battle of St. George's Caye, byacing qeru ru mopuw ryax ga sinqqas sinllwa Peris na koka nha, nyux nha cunen Battle of St. George's Caye. tansuqan mopuw spat qkbhul kawas lga, pwahan nha mrhuw maki sqani. kawas 1840, 貝里斯 qani lga kkhangan na koka IN la, kawas 1862年 lga mrhuw na 英國 ku qmahang lha, nanu yasa sllwan maha Huntulas hebang na IN, kawas 1904年 Huntulas hebang na IN ga cyosa nha kwara squliq pyang hopa' na maci squliq ga: 貝里斯城: 9969 Pelis qani ga 9969 史坦克瑞克鎮 (Stann Creek Town): 2459 maci Stankzwe2459 科羅薩爾: 1696 Klosal 1696 橘道: 1244 Citaw 1244 蓬塔戈爾達: 706 Fungtaklta706 聖伊格納西卡育 (San Ignacio Cayo): 421 Seniknasikayi 421 猴河鎮 : 384 Hohcen 384 馬林斯里弗: 243 Malinslifo 243 kawas 1964 ru byacing qutux te kahul sa sinhloyal Giin mpkal mha ps'rux pkahang ita nanak na sefu.1973年6月 kawas 1973 byacing mtzyu', lalu' na qani ga taring sa Huntulas hebang na IN ru yugun maha Pelis la. kian rhyal na Peris ga nyu maki sa htgan gwagi' sa Cunmayco bih na umi, byaqan gwagi' ru kura ghzyaq sulax Mosiko, mubuy ki Kwatimala sa byakan gwagi' mkura mkilux, te htgan gwagi' lga cyux bih na hwtulas. kinqruzyux na umi nya ga 320km, zyaw na umi cingay balay ku Tawyu nya, rhzyal nya ga cingay balay rryax, cingay balay ku mslaq uraw ru mkilux balay ku hlahuy. qinsyugal te sazing rhyal ga baqun maha kura mkilux ru kura ghzyaq, kura mklux ga rhyal kwara rgyax Maya ku pyang nya rrgyx, rryax ga maki sa byaqan wagi ru kura sa mkilux ghzyaq ru htgan gwagi' ru kura sa ghzaq, cyux qutux qu hopa' balay rgyx lalu' nhe ga ryax Kkeskmu na Wetoliya king wagiq nyaega 1121.97 m, piyang gwagiq na ryax nha. kura sa ghziq ru' mlu sa umi lga be'nux kwara', pyang wagiq rgyax ga ini tehuk sa 61 m, rhyal nha ga mslaq msqsya'. llyung nha ga 莫潘 llyung Mopan ru llyung Pelis, kura sa mkilux lga cingay balay qu mkilux kayal, kwara' lga mkilux kwara' qu kayal, 季 qutux kawas ga mtkzay ru mhoziq, taring cyugal byacin ru tehuk magal byacing ga tkzyay kayal, kahul sa tzyu ru tehuk mopuw qutux byacing lga mhoziq kayal. raytay ga kayal nha ga mopuw pitu ru pusal magal wagiq nya, qutux kawas kura sa ghyaq qinlwaxax nha ga 1350, kura sa mkilux lga qinlwaxax nha ga wagiq iyal 4575 毫米, hlahuy nha hopa' balay kwara ga 70% kinrahu', ryax na'bagan ru hoqan abaw cingay balay ru hopa behuy nya mmaw hmol. sebu Peris qani ga blaq balay magal sa Giin smi inlung na minsyu, glu nakoka IN. zyaw na Sfa lga tekahul psulung sa IN klang la, Pelis ru bih nya kaKstalicya sazing koka qani ga blaq balay kinhangan naha sa maki sa koka Cunmayco, Pelis Giin mpkal ga maki qu sazing hopa' Tang nya, maki teska ru te'zil ga minsqutux minsyu Tan ru maki teska te llaw minsqutux minsyu Tan. mrhuw pspung pqasu pcyagun 貝里斯分為6個區 qinsyugan Pelis ga mtyzyu. smsun zyaw na binah koka tehuk sa kawas 2019年 byacing pitu, Peris koka qani ga qeru' pgal payat koka qu wayal msblaq, Peris koka qani ga msblaq Cunhaminko maki sa mopuw magal koka sa te qutux, koka qani ga msblaq sa Salawearapo sinhloyan koka ru Ksowo sinhloyan koka psrux sa blaq na inlungan. msblaq kin Kwatimala baha hmswa kawas 1859年 kinhangan koka Pelis yaya' na koka nya ga IN kmal maha mpkal miru ki Aysinena ka sinpkal naha ungat nanu zyaw nya, nanu yasa kmal qu Kwatimala mha rhyal nha qu Peris qan, kawas 1981年 mpuci nanak qu Pelis, nanu ini si inlugan na Kwatimala, si tehuk sa kawas 1991年 ru byacing qeru ryax mtzyu' swalan na Kwatimala maha mbuci na koka qu Pelis ru ryax qasa lga psrux sa psblaq na sazing koka, ana ga kruma' ga maki cikay psszyoq nha na, kawas 2003 ru byacing mopuw sazing koka qani ga mpkal sa beh qoka na Meco. sinhloyan ru mtnaq kawas byacing sazing ga miru maha "inlugan na minnrwan ru mpkal mha mosa' ta maha qenu ga pblaq ta mqyanux sazing ta koka qani, mssi inlugan naha qu sazing koka qani ga psblaq ta laxi msazyux mha. kawas 2018 byacing payat ryax mopuw magal senkyo qu Kwatimala, kawas 2019 byacing magal ryax mspat gam sankyo qu sebu Peris, masuq senkyo lga sazing koka qani ga smuan kwara mha rhyal qani ga posaw ta pyang hopa' na hoyin, pnaga' pyang hopa' na hoin sinpang. sblaq sa ita Cunhangminko babaw na mbuciq qu Peris rima I psrux sa pblaq ki Cunhangminko ki Kwatimala. kawas 1981 babaw na mbuci qu Peris lga, maki qutux qu squliq na Cyuko rpsyobay ga Uyuncin kin Pelis kmraw sinhloyan minsyu na Tan, taring tekahul sa Sayite. musa ru nanu yasa mpkal ma psblaq kyalun nya thoki na Pelis Cyoci. katl. pulays maha psblaq kin Cunhangminko ru. kawas 1984 byacing magal, trang maki sa Kwatimala qu mrhuw ta Cunhangminko-Luicen mwah sa Peris, nanu yasa qu ktan ne qu Wuyuzen ru thoki Pulays mpkan maha mosa te mta sun qenu' ga psxun ta sazing koka, smwal uzi qu thoki Pulays, babaw na mwah Kwatimala qu Luizen lga, baha hmswa Kwatimala kmal maha rhyal na Pelis ga ara na Kwatimala ma, nanu yasa zyaw na aki ta psblaq ka sazing koka qani ga Cunhangminko ru Peris qani ga ini swali na fuku soto Lutawfu. ropos Samola Kwatimala, mkmal sa Kwatimala sinhlozyan ppkal maha, maha ni Cunhangminko swalangnnya maha koka qu Peris. nanu psalax sami ki Cunhangminko, nanu yasa memaw thlaw renwa Luicen sefu Cunhangminko, laxi phmut mtzyaw mosa tmwang yaqih iyal la, tmwang thoki Pulislay pseekyo ga slaqux nha, binah na Lianhominsyu Tan qu smpung zyawaw, nanu yasa sefu Cunhangminko qani lga sinnah laxi qu zezyaw qani ha. kawas 1989 byacing mqeru ga msbinah mthoki lozi qu Pulays, nanu mere nya qu Sayit. musa mha isu pthoki sa smsun zyaw na bingah koka, nanu yasa mkita lozi, nanu yasa kawas 1989 mopuw byacing mopuw cyugal ryax lga msblaq ta kin koka qani la. msblaq ki ki koka Cyunghwazminkunfko kawas 1987 sazing byacing ru mtzyu ryax, psrux msblaq ki Cyunghwazminkunfko ki koka Pelia. kawas 1989mopuw byacing mopuw qutux ryax, baha hmswa msblaq kin Cunhangminko lga talax ki Cyunghwazminkunhfko la. pspira koka ga pyang balay qqhuniq psplang nha pila, soni' qani lga nogyow qu n psplang nha, yang ka kmsya' ru yutak ru boywe qqhuniq ru koko, pagay, tbaku', guquh, kacing ru kwara qqulih. kwara cinqqulih na zezyaw uzi. koba na kbalay qasu, koba kbalay nniqun, tminun qekaya ngasal, rangki ru ttbaku'. taring Amerika pinhtuw Cunyang smsun zyawaw na babaw cingbwanan qani ga, koka Pelis maki sa Cunmeco qani ga pyang wagiq qu ungat pcyagun 9.4%, mqziutn na ssqulih ga 33.5%. kawas 1999ga GDP ga mkrkyes 6.4%, 10.5% tehuk sa kawas 2000 10.5%. sinplan qani ga tehuk sa kawas 2001年 mhgup 3%, baha hmswa ga zensekay na qinnxan myaqih kwara ru hopa na behuy hmiriq qu Nogyo. pcyagun na qqulih ru ngngayan. nanu misu qani lga siki binah na koka mwah kmraw lha te cipoq qu mqzinut. kinhagan na kinsat kawas 2019年 kesang nah ga mopuw mang squliq ga patung qu wal nha qutan squliq, maki sa zesekay qani ga te mopuw ptyaqih sa lalu na koka nha. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部

Belize hya' ga cyux maki' tay 17 15 N, 88 45 W na cung-Meco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 22,966 sq km (maki' tay 152ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 22,806 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 160 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 353,858. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 6.90%, lhlahuy hya' ga 60.60%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 32.50%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Belmopan. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 10 na tay mqiru' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Elizabeth II, aring ryax tay 6 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1952 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. lalu' koka lalu' na ego ga Belize, lalu' na Sipaya ga Belice. raral ga Belize qani ga lelu nya "Insuhontolas", kawas 1973 lga sinllwan nha ma lalu' na misu la. lalu' sinllwan koka ga ini baqi hinkangi la, pongan sraral ga qutux ke' maha te kahul sa Sipanya qu hngyang na lalu' nha', kawas misu qani lga sinllwan na lalu' qani ga te kahul sa ke Maya, ptring sa "mzyup sa Iza". zywaw na kinbkesan kawas 1502, Klunpu mluw sa syaw na Pelis umi rut thuk Klunpu, ana ga ini tehuk Pelis kakay nya'. kawas 1511, 'ringan balay mtta' sa Pelis ga kahul squliq Oco na Sipanya cinqasu na squliq, ana ga cingay balay ga wayal kyapun na squliq Maya ru psun nha smyus ru alang nha qinyatan. maki' qutux qu kyapun nha ga lalu' nya ga Kunsalo‧Klole ru qekon kin laqi' na kneril Citomar. nasankan, qinnxan nha ga yang Mayas, cyugal laqi' nha' ru nanu qani qu kinholan na Maystiso. kawas 1638, maki' qu squliq na Oco, ana ga aring sa kawas 1670 ungat thozay maki' qutux kawas, kwara squliq qani ga lokah kmut qhuniq, baha hmswa cingay ka qhuniq ga myang qhuniq Moswe, qhuniq mtalax Pasi posun nha sa Oco ru galan nha qqamas. kawas 1700 cinringan, qhuniq na qhuniq hopa na abaw hwasin qani ga soyan nha balay posa sa te binah, nanu yasa cingay balay ku ppquriq ga mwah qmol, maki ku mya Sipanya maki sqani, nanu wahan tmabuqk na squliq na Intuw uzi. trang ryax qasa ga smul ku koka Sipanya swalan nnha squliq na IN mwah kmut qhunliq ini nha swali nha maki sa rhyal qani. kawas 1798, mciriq ku koka IN ru Sipanya, maki qutux thoki' Sipanya lalu' nya ga Zyukatan pwahun nya tyul sazing hopa' na qasu mwah qmul rhyal. byacing qeru ru ryax cyugal tehuk byacing qeru ru ryax mopuw, cingay balay mcilia sa Peris qani, tehuk sa laxan na Sipanya lga, qani sun nha Battle of St. George's Caye, byacing qeru ru mopuw ryax ga sinqqas sinllwa Peris na koka nha, nyux nha cunen Battle of St. George's Caye. tansuqan mopuw spat qkbhul kawas lga, pwahan nha mrhuw maki sqani. kawas 1840, 貝里斯 qani lga kkhangan na koka IN la, kawas 1862年 lga mrhuw na 英國 ku qmahang lha, nanu yasa sllwan maha Huntulas hebang na IN, kawas 1904年 Huntulas hebang na IN ga cyosa nha kwara squliq pyang hopa' na maci squliq ga: 貝里斯城: 9969 Pelis qani ga 9969 史坦克瑞克鎮 (Stann Creek Town): 2459 maci Stankzwe2459 科羅薩爾: 1696 Klosal 1696 橘道: 1244 Citaw 1244 蓬塔戈爾達: 706 Fungtaklta706 聖伊格納西卡育 (San Ignacio Cayo): 421 Seniknasikayi 421 猴河鎮 : 384 Hohcen 384 馬林斯里弗: 243 Malinslifo 243 kawas 1964 ru byacing qutux te kahul sa sinhloyal Giin mpkal mha ps'rux pkahang ita nanak na sefu.1973年6月 kawas 1973 byacing mtzyu', lalu' na qani ga taring sa Huntulas hebang na IN ru yugun maha Pelis la. kian rhyal na Peris ga nyu maki sa htgan gwagi' sa Cunmayco bih na umi, byaqan gwagi' ru kura ghzyaq sulax Mosiko, mubuy ki Kwatimala sa byakan gwagi' mkura mkilux, te htgan gwagi' lga cyux bih na hwtulas. kinqruzyux na umi nya ga 320km, zyaw na umi cingay balay ku Tawyu nya, rhzyal nya ga cingay balay rryax, cingay balay ku mslaq uraw ru mkilux balay ku hlahuy. qinsyugal te sazing rhyal ga baqun maha kura mkilux ru kura ghzyaq, kura mklux ga rhyal kwara rgyax Maya ku pyang nya rrgyx, rryax ga maki sa byaqan wagi ru kura sa mkilux ghzyaq ru htgan gwagi' ru kura sa ghzaq, cyux qutux qu hopa' balay rgyx lalu' nhe ga ryax Kkeskmu na Wetoliya king wagiq nyaega 1121.97 m, piyang gwagiq na ryax nha. kura sa ghziq ru' mlu sa umi lga be'nux kwara', pyang wagiq rgyax ga ini tehuk sa 61 m, rhyal nha ga mslaq msqsya'. llyung nha ga 莫潘 llyung Mopan ru llyung Pelis, kura sa mkilux lga cingay balay qu mkilux kayal, kwara' lga mkilux kwara' qu kayal, 季 qutux kawas ga mtkzay ru mhoziq, taring cyugal byacin ru tehuk magal byacing ga tkzyay kayal, kahul sa tzyu ru tehuk mopuw qutux byacing lga mhoziq kayal. raytay ga kayal nha ga mopuw pitu ru pusal magal wagiq nya, qutux kawas kura sa ghyaq qinlwaxax nha ga 1350, kura sa mkilux lga qinlwaxax nha ga wagiq iyal 4575 毫米, hlahuy nha hopa' balay kwara ga 70% kinrahu', ryax na'bagan ru hoqan abaw cingay balay ru hopa behuy nya mmaw hmol. sebu Peris qani ga blaq balay magal sa Giin smi inlung na minsyu, glu nakoka IN. zyaw na Sfa lga tekahul psulung sa IN klang la, Pelis ru bih nya kaKstalicya sazing koka qani ga blaq balay kinhangan naha sa maki sa koka Cunmayco, Pelis Giin mpkal ga maki qu sazing hopa' Tang nya, maki teska ru te'zil ga minsqutux minsyu Tan ru maki teska te llaw minsqutux minsyu Tan. mrhuw pspung pqasu pcyagun 貝里斯分為6個區 qinsyugan Pelis ga mtyzyu. smsun zyaw na binah koka tehuk sa kawas 2019年 byacing pitu, Peris koka qani ga qeru' pgal payat koka qu wayal msblaq, Peris koka qani ga msblaq Cunhaminko maki sa mopuw magal koka sa te qutux, koka qani ga msblaq sa Salawearapo sinhloyan koka ru Ksowo sinhloyan koka psrux sa blaq na inlungan. msblaq kin Kwatimala baha hmswa kawas 1859年 kinhangan koka Pelis yaya' na koka nya ga IN kmal maha mpkal miru ki Aysinena ka sinpkal naha ungat nanu zyaw nya, nanu yasa kmal qu Kwatimala mha rhyal nha qu Peris qan, kawas 1981年 mpuci nanak qu Pelis, nanu ini si inlugan na Kwatimala, si tehuk sa kawas 1991年 ru byacing qeru ryax mtzyu' swalan na Kwatimala maha mbuci na koka qu Pelis ru ryax qasa lga psrux sa psblaq na sazing koka, ana ga kruma' ga maki cikay psszyoq nha na, kawas 2003 ru byacing mopuw sazing koka qani ga mpkal sa beh qoka na Meco. sinhloyan ru mtnaq kawas byacing sazing ga miru maha "inlugan na minnrwan ru mpkal mha mosa' ta maha qenu ga pblaq ta mqyanux sazing ta koka qani, mssi inlugan naha qu sazing koka qani ga psblaq ta laxi msazyux mha. kawas 2018 byacing payat ryax mopuw magal senkyo qu Kwatimala, kawas 2019 byacing magal ryax mspat gam sankyo qu sebu Peris, masuq senkyo lga sazing koka qani ga smuan kwara mha rhyal qani ga posaw ta pyang hopa' na hoyin, pnaga' pyang hopa' na hoin sinpang. sblaq sa ita Cunhangminko babaw na mbuciq qu Peris rima I psrux sa pblaq ki Cunhangminko ki Kwatimala. kawas 1981 babaw na mbuci qu Peris lga, maki qutux qu squliq na Cyuko rpsyobay ga Uyuncin kin Pelis kmraw sinhloyan minsyu na Tan, taring tekahul sa Sayite. musa ru nanu yasa mpkal ma psblaq kyalun nya thoki na Pelis Cyoci. katl. pulays maha psblaq kin Cunhangminko ru. kawas 1984 byacing magal, trang maki sa Kwatimala qu mrhuw ta Cunhangminko-Luicen mwah sa Peris, nanu yasa qu ktan ne qu Wuyuzen ru thoki Pulays mpkan maha mosa te mta sun qenu' ga psxun ta sazing koka, smwal uzi qu thoki Pulays, babaw na mwah Kwatimala qu Luizen lga, baha hmswa Kwatimala kmal maha rhyal na Pelis ga ara na Kwatimala ma, nanu yasa zyaw na aki ta psblaq ka sazing koka qani ga Cunhangminko ru Peris qani ga ini swali na fuku soto Lutawfu. ropos Samola Kwatimala, mkmal sa Kwatimala sinhlozyan ppkal maha, maha ni Cunhangminko swalangnnya maha koka qu Peris. nanu psalax sami ki Cunhangminko, nanu yasa memaw thlaw renwa Luicen sefu Cunhangminko, laxi phmut mtzyaw mosa tmwang yaqih iyal la, tmwang thoki Pulislay pseekyo ga slaqux nha, binah na Lianhominsyu Tan qu smpung zyawaw, nanu yasa sefu Cunhangminko qani lga sinnah laxi qu zezyaw qani ha. kawas 1989 byacing mqeru ga msbinah mthoki lozi qu Pulays, nanu mere nya qu Sayit. musa mha isu pthoki sa smsun zyaw na bingah koka, nanu yasa mkita lozi, nanu yasa kawas 1989 mopuw byacing mopuw cyugal ryax lga msblaq ta kin koka qani la. msblaq ki ki koka Cyunghwazminkunfko kawas 1987 sazing byacing ru mtzyu ryax, psrux msblaq ki Cyunghwazminkunfko ki koka Pelia. kawas 1989mopuw byacing mopuw qutux ryax, baha hmswa msblaq kin Cunhangminko lga talax ki Cyunghwazminkunhfko la. pspira koka ga pyang balay qqhuniq psplang nha pila, soni' qani lga nogyow qu n psplang nha, yang ka kmsya' ru yutak ru boywe qqhuniq ru koko, pagay, tbaku', guquh, kacing ru kwara qqulih. kwara cinqqulih na zezyaw uzi. koba na kbalay qasu, koba kbalay nniqun, tminun qekaya ngasal, rangki ru ttbaku'. taring Amerika pinhtuw Cunyang smsun zyawaw na babaw cingbwanan qani ga, koka Pelis maki sa Cunmeco qani ga pyang wagiq qu ungat pcyagun 9.4%, mqziutn na ssqulih ga 33.5%. kawas 1999ga GDP ga mkrkyes 6.4%, 10.5% tehuk sa kawas 2000 10.5%. sinplan qani ga tehuk sa kawas 2001年 mhgup 3%, baha hmswa ga zensekay na qinnxan myaqih kwara ru hopa na behuy hmiriq qu Nogyo. pcyagun na qqulih ru ngngayan. nanu misu qani lga siki binah na koka mwah kmraw lha te cipoq qu mqzinut. kinhagan na kinsat kawas 2019年 kesang nah ga mopuw mang squliq ga patung qu wal nha qutan squliq, maki sa zesekay qani ga te mopuw ptyaqih sa lalu na koka nha. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部
S.PHON: βelize ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj ** ** n, ** ** w na ʦ~ʨuŋ-meʦ~ʨo s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ **,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj ***ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa **,*** s~ɕq km, kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa *** s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa ***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa *.**%, lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa βelmopan. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa ** na taj mqiruʔ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa elizaβetħ ii, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. laluʔ koka laluʔ na eɣo ɣa βelize, laluʔ na s~ɕipaja ɣa βeliʦ~ʨe. raral ɣa βelize qani ɣa lelu nja "ins~ɕuħontolas~ɕ", kawas~ɕ **** lɣa s~ɕinllwan nħa ma laluʔ na mis~ɕu la. laluʔ s~ɕinllwan koka ɣa ini βaqi ħinkaŋi la, poŋan s~ɕraral ɣa qutux keʔ maħa te kaħul s~ɕa s~ɕipanja qu ħŋjaŋ na laluʔ nħaʔ, kawas~ɕ mis~ɕu qani lɣa s~ɕinllwan na laluʔ qani ɣa te kaħul s~ɕa ke maja, ptriŋ s~ɕa "mzjup s~ɕa iza". zjwaw na kinβkes~ɕan kawas~ɕ ****, klunpu mluw s~ɕa s~ɕjaw na pelis~ɕ umi rut tħuk klunpu, ana ɣa ini teħuk pelis~ɕ kakaj njaʔ. kawas~ɕ ****, ʔriŋan βalaj mttaʔ s~ɕa pelis~ɕ ɣa kaħul s~ɕquliq oʦ~ʨo na s~ɕipanja ʦ~ʨinqas~ɕu na s~ɕquliq, ana ɣa ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj ɣa wajal kjapun na s~ɕquliq maja ru ps~ɕun nħa s~ɕmjus~ɕ ru alaŋ nħa qinjatan. makiʔ qutux qu kjapun nħa ɣa laluʔ nja ɣa kuns~ɕalo*klole ru qekon kin laqiʔ na kneril ʦ~ʨitomar. nas~ɕankan, qinnxan nħa ɣa jaŋ majas~ɕ, ʦ~ʨjuɣal laqiʔ nħaʔ ru nanu qani qu kinħolan na majs~ɕtis~ɕo. kawas~ɕ ****, makiʔ qu s~ɕquliq na oʦ~ʨo, ana ɣa ariŋ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** uŋat tħozaj makiʔ qutux kawas~ɕ, kwara s~ɕquliq qani ɣa lokaħ kmut qħuniq, βaħa ħms~ɕwa ʦ~ʨiŋaj ka qħuniq ɣa mjaŋ qħuniq mos~ɕwe, qħuniq mtalax pas~ɕi pos~ɕun nħa s~ɕa oʦ~ʨo ru ɣalan nħa qqamas~ɕ. kawas~ɕ **** ʦ~ʨinriŋan, qħuniq na qħuniq ħopa na aβaw ħwas~ɕin qani ɣa s~ɕojan nħa βalaj pos~ɕa s~ɕa te βinaħ, nanu jas~ɕa ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj ku ppquriq ɣa mwaħ qmol, maki ku mja s~ɕipanja maki s~ɕqani, nanu waħan tmaβuqk na s~ɕquliq na intuw uzi. traŋ rjax qas~ɕa ɣa s~ɕmul ku koka s~ɕipanja s~ɕwalan nnħa s~ɕquliq na in mwaħ kmut qħunliq ini nħa s~ɕwali nħa maki s~ɕa rħjal qani. kawas~ɕ ****, mʦ~ʨiriq ku koka in ru s~ɕipanja, maki qutux tħokiʔ s~ɕipanja laluʔ nja ɣa zjukatan pwaħun nja tjul s~ɕaziŋ ħopaʔ na qas~ɕu mwaħ qmul rħjal. βjaʦ~ʨiŋ qeru ru rjax ʦ~ʨjuɣal teħuk βjaʦ~ʨiŋ qeru ru rjax mopuw, ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj mʦ~ʨilia s~ɕa peris~ɕ qani, teħuk s~ɕa laxan na s~ɕipanja lɣa, qani s~ɕun nħa βattle o* s~ɕt. ɣeorɣeʔs~ɕ ʦ~ʨaje, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ qeru ru mopuw rjax ɣa s~ɕinqqas~ɕ s~ɕinllwa peris~ɕ na koka nħa, njux nħa ʦ~ʨunen βattle o* s~ɕt. ɣeorɣeʔs~ɕ ʦ~ʨaje. tans~ɕuqan mopuw s~ɕpat qkβħul kawas~ɕ lɣa, pwaħan nħa mrħuw maki s~ɕqani. kawas~ɕ ****, *** qani lɣa kkħaŋan na koka in la, kawas~ɕ ***** lɣa mrħuw na ** ku qmaħaŋ lħa, nanu jas~ɕa s~ɕllwan maħa ħuntulas~ɕ ħeβaŋ na in, kawas~ɕ ***** ħuntulas~ɕ ħeβaŋ na in ɣa ʦ~ʨjos~ɕa nħa kwara s~ɕquliq pjaŋ ħopaʔ na maʦ~ʨi s~ɕquliq ɣa: ****: **** pelis~ɕ qani ɣa **** ****** (s~ɕtann ʦ~ʨreek town): **** maʦ~ʨi s~ɕtankzwe**** ****: **** klos~ɕal **** **: **** ʦ~ʨitaw **** *****: *** *uŋtaklta*** ******* (s~ɕan iɣnaʦ~ʨio ʦ~ʨajo): *** s~ɕeniknas~ɕikaji *** *** : *** ħoħʦ~ʨen *** *****: *** malins~ɕli*o *** kawas~ɕ **** ru βjaʦ~ʨiŋ qutux te kaħul s~ɕa s~ɕinħlojal ɣiin mpkal mħa ps~ɕʔrux pkaħaŋ ita nanak na s~ɕe*u.******* kawas~ɕ **** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ mtzjuʔ, laluʔ na qani ɣa tariŋ s~ɕa ħuntulas~ɕ ħeβaŋ na in ru juɣun maħa pelis~ɕ la. kian rħjal na peris~ɕ ɣa nju maki s~ɕa ħtɣan ɣwaɣiʔ s~ɕa ʦ~ʨunmajʦ~ʨo βiħ na umi, βjaqan ɣwaɣiʔ ru kura ɣħzjaq s~ɕulax mos~ɕiko, muβuj ki kwatimala s~ɕa βjakan ɣwaɣiʔ mkura mkilux, te ħtɣan ɣwaɣiʔ lɣa ʦ~ʨjux βiħ na ħwtulas~ɕ. kinqruzjux na umi nja ɣa ***km, zjaw na umi ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj ku tawju nja, rħzjal nja ɣa ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj rrjax, ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj ku ms~ɕlaq uraw ru mkilux βalaj ku ħlaħuj. qins~ɕjuɣal te s~ɕaziŋ rħjal ɣa βaqun maħa kura mkilux ru kura ɣħzjaq, kura mklux ɣa rħjal kwara rɣjax maja ku pjaŋ nja rrɣjx, rrjax ɣa maki s~ɕa βjaqan waɣi ru kura s~ɕa mkilux ɣħzjaq ru ħtɣan ɣwaɣiʔ ru kura s~ɕa ɣħzaq, ʦ~ʨjux qutux qu ħopaʔ βalaj rɣjx laluʔ nħe ɣa rjax kkes~ɕkmu na wetolija kiŋ waɣiq njaeɣa ****.** m, pijaŋ ɣwaɣiq na rjax nħa. kura s~ɕa ɣħziq ruʔ mlu s~ɕa umi lɣa βeʔnux kwaraʔ, pjaŋ waɣiq rɣjax ɣa ini teħuk s~ɕa ** m, rħjal nħa ɣa ms~ɕlaq ms~ɕqs~ɕjaʔ. lljuŋ nħa ɣa ** lljuŋ mopan ru lljuŋ pelis~ɕ, kura s~ɕa mkilux lɣa ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj qu mkilux kajal, kwaraʔ lɣa mkilux kwaraʔ qu kajal, * qutux kawas~ɕ ɣa mtkzaj ru mħoziq, tariŋ ʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨin ru teħuk maɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ɣa tkzjaj kajal, kaħul s~ɕa tzju ru teħuk mopuw qutux βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa mħoziq kajal. rajtaj ɣa kajal nħa ɣa mopuw pitu ru pus~ɕal maɣal waɣiq nja, qutux kawas~ɕ kura s~ɕa ɣħjaq qinlwaxax nħa ɣa ****, kura s~ɕa mkilux lɣa qinlwaxax nħa ɣa waɣiq ijal **** **, ħlaħuj nħa ħopaʔ βalaj kwara ɣa **% kinraħuʔ, rjax naʔβaɣan ru ħoqan aβaw ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj ru ħopa βeħuj nja mmaw ħmol. s~ɕeβu peris~ɕ qani ɣa βlaq βalaj maɣal s~ɕa ɣiin s~ɕmi inluŋ na mins~ɕju, ɣlu nakoka in. zjaw na s~ɕ*a lɣa tekaħul ps~ɕuluŋ s~ɕa in klaŋ la, pelis~ɕ ru βiħ nja kaks~ɕtaliʦ~ʨja s~ɕaziŋ koka qani ɣa βlaq βalaj kinħaŋan naħa s~ɕa maki s~ɕa koka ʦ~ʨunmajʦ~ʨo, pelis~ɕ ɣiin mpkal ɣa maki qu s~ɕaziŋ ħopaʔ taŋ nja, maki tes~ɕka ru teʔzil ɣa mins~ɕqutux mins~ɕju tan ru maki tes~ɕka te llaw mins~ɕqutux mins~ɕju tan. mrħuw ps~ɕpuŋ pqas~ɕu pʦ~ʨjaɣun ******** qins~ɕjuɣan pelis~ɕ ɣa mtjzju. s~ɕms~ɕun zjaw na βinaħ koka teħuk s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ***** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ pitu, peris~ɕ koka qani ɣa qeruʔ pɣal pajat koka qu wajal ms~ɕβlaq, peris~ɕ koka qani ɣa ms~ɕβlaq ʦ~ʨunħaminko maki s~ɕa mopuw maɣal koka s~ɕa te qutux, koka qani ɣa ms~ɕβlaq s~ɕa s~ɕalawearapo s~ɕinħlojan koka ru ks~ɕowo s~ɕinħlojan koka ps~ɕrux s~ɕa βlaq na inluŋan. ms~ɕβlaq kin kwatimala βaħa ħms~ɕwa kawas~ɕ ***** kinħaŋan koka pelis~ɕ jajaʔ na koka nja ɣa in kmal maħa mpkal miru ki ajs~ɕinena ka s~ɕinpkal naħa uŋat nanu zjaw nja, nanu jas~ɕa kmal qu kwatimala mħa rħjal nħa qu peris~ɕ qan, kawas~ɕ ***** mpuʦ~ʨi nanak qu pelis~ɕ, nanu ini s~ɕi inluɣan na kwatimala, s~ɕi teħuk s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ***** ru βjaʦ~ʨiŋ qeru rjax mtzjuʔ s~ɕwalan na kwatimala maħa mβuʦ~ʨi na koka qu pelis~ɕ ru rjax qas~ɕa lɣa ps~ɕrux s~ɕa ps~ɕβlaq na s~ɕaziŋ koka, ana ɣa krumaʔ ɣa maki ʦ~ʨikaj ps~ɕs~ɕzjoq nħa na, kawas~ɕ **** ru βjaʦ~ʨiŋ mopuw s~ɕaziŋ koka qani ɣa mpkal s~ɕa βeħ qoka na meʦ~ʨo. s~ɕinħlojan ru mtnaq kawas~ɕ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕaziŋ ɣa miru maħa "inluɣan na minnrwan ru mpkal mħa mos~ɕaʔ ta maħa qenu ɣa pβlaq ta mqjanux s~ɕaziŋ ta koka qani, ms~ɕs~ɕi inluɣan naħa qu s~ɕaziŋ koka qani ɣa ps~ɕβlaq ta laxi ms~ɕazjux mħa. kawas~ɕ **** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ pajat rjax mopuw maɣal s~ɕenkjo qu kwatimala, kawas~ɕ **** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ maɣal rjax ms~ɕpat ɣam s~ɕankjo qu s~ɕeβu peris~ɕ, mas~ɕuq s~ɕenkjo lɣa s~ɕaziŋ koka qani ɣa s~ɕmuan kwara mħa rħjal qani ɣa pos~ɕaw ta pjaŋ ħopaʔ na ħojin, pnaɣaʔ pjaŋ ħopaʔ na ħoin s~ɕinpaŋ. s~ɕβlaq s~ɕa ita ʦ~ʨunħaŋminko βaβaw na mβuʦ~ʨiq qu peris~ɕ rima i ps~ɕrux s~ɕa pβlaq ki ʦ~ʨunħaŋminko ki kwatimala. kawas~ɕ **** βaβaw na mβuʦ~ʨi qu peris~ɕ lɣa, maki qutux qu s~ɕquliq na ʦ~ʨjuko rps~ɕjoβaj ɣa ujunʦ~ʨin kin pelis~ɕ kmraw s~ɕinħlojan mins~ɕju na tan, tariŋ tekaħul s~ɕa s~ɕajite. mus~ɕa ru nanu jas~ɕa mpkal ma ps~ɕβlaq kjalun nja tħoki na pelis~ɕ ʦ~ʨjoʦ~ʨi. katl. pulajs~ɕ maħa ps~ɕβlaq kin ʦ~ʨunħaŋminko ru. kawas~ɕ **** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ maɣal, traŋ maki s~ɕa kwatimala qu mrħuw ta ʦ~ʨunħaŋminko-luiʦ~ʨen mwaħ s~ɕa peris~ɕ, nanu jas~ɕa qu ktan ne qu wujuzen ru tħoki pulajs~ɕ mpkan maħa mos~ɕa te mta s~ɕun qenuʔ ɣa ps~ɕxun ta s~ɕaziŋ koka, s~ɕmwal uzi qu tħoki pulajs~ɕ, βaβaw na mwaħ kwatimala qu luizen lɣa, βaħa ħms~ɕwa kwatimala kmal maħa rħjal na pelis~ɕ ɣa ara na kwatimala ma, nanu jas~ɕa zjaw na aki ta ps~ɕβlaq ka s~ɕaziŋ koka qani ɣa ʦ~ʨunħaŋminko ru peris~ɕ qani ɣa ini s~ɕwali na *uku s~ɕoto lutaw*u. ropos~ɕ s~ɕamola kwatimala, mkmal s~ɕa kwatimala s~ɕinħlozjan ppkal maħa, maħa ni ʦ~ʨunħaŋminko s~ɕwalaŋnnja maħa koka qu peris~ɕ. nanu ps~ɕalax s~ɕami ki ʦ~ʨunħaŋminko, nanu jas~ɕa memaw tħlaw renwa luiʦ~ʨen s~ɕe*u ʦ~ʨunħaŋminko, laxi pħmut mtzjaw mos~ɕa tmwaŋ jaqiħ ijal la, tmwaŋ tħoki pulis~ɕlaj ps~ɕeekjo ɣa s~ɕlaqux nħa, βinaħ na lianħomins~ɕju tan qu s~ɕmpuŋ zjawaw, nanu jas~ɕa s~ɕe*u ʦ~ʨunħaŋminko qani lɣa s~ɕinnaħ laxi qu zezjaw qani ħa. kawas~ɕ **** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ mqeru ɣa ms~ɕβinaħ mtħoki lozi qu pulajs~ɕ, nanu mere nja qu s~ɕajit. mus~ɕa mħa is~ɕu ptħoki s~ɕa s~ɕms~ɕun zjaw na βiŋaħ koka, nanu jas~ɕa mkita lozi, nanu jas~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** mopuw βjaʦ~ʨiŋ mopuw ʦ~ʨjuɣal rjax lɣa ms~ɕβlaq ta kin koka qani la. ms~ɕβlaq ki ki koka ʦ~ʨjuŋħwazminkun*ko kawas~ɕ **** s~ɕaziŋ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ru mtzju rjax, ps~ɕrux ms~ɕβlaq ki ʦ~ʨjuŋħwazminkun*ko ki koka pelia. kawas~ɕ ****mopuw βjaʦ~ʨiŋ mopuw qutux rjax, βaħa ħms~ɕwa ms~ɕβlaq kin ʦ~ʨunħaŋminko lɣa talax ki ʦ~ʨjuŋħwazminkunħ*ko la. ps~ɕpira koka ɣa pjaŋ βalaj qqħuniq ps~ɕplaŋ nħa pila, s~ɕoniʔ qani lɣa noɣjow qu n ps~ɕplaŋ nħa, jaŋ ka kms~ɕjaʔ ru jutak ru βojwe qqħuniq ru koko, paɣaj, tβakuʔ, ɣuquħ, kaʦ~ʨiŋ ru kwara qquliħ. kwara ʦ~ʨinqquliħ na zezjaw uzi. koβa na kβalaj qas~ɕu, koβa kβalaj nniqun, tminun qekaja ŋas~ɕal, raŋki ru ttβakuʔ. tariŋ amerika pinħtuw ʦ~ʨunjaŋ s~ɕms~ɕun zjawaw na βaβaw ʦ~ʨiŋβwanan qani ɣa, koka pelis~ɕ maki s~ɕa ʦ~ʨunmeʦ~ʨo qani ɣa pjaŋ waɣiq qu uŋat pʦ~ʨjaɣun *.*%, mqziutn na s~ɕs~ɕquliħ ɣa **.*%. kawas~ɕ ****ɣa ɣ*p ɣa mkrkjes~ɕ *.*%, **.*% teħuk s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** **.*%. s~ɕinplan qani ɣa teħuk s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ***** mħɣup *%, βaħa ħms~ɕwa ɣa zens~ɕekaj na qinnxan mjaqiħ kwara ru ħopa na βeħuj ħmiriq qu noɣjo. pʦ~ʨjaɣun na qquliħ ru ŋŋajan. nanu mis~ɕu qani lɣa s~ɕiki βinaħ na koka mwaħ kmraw lħa te ʦ~ʨipoq qu mqzinut. kinħaɣan na kins~ɕat kawas~ɕ ***** kes~ɕaŋ naħ ɣa mopuw maŋ s~ɕquliq ɣa patuŋ qu wal nħa qutan s~ɕquliq, maki s~ɕa zes~ɕekaj qani ɣa te mopuw ptjaqiħ s~ɕa lalu na koka nħa. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
